rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that x[n * 10000] accesses far beyond the 5-element array x and notes the multiplier 10000 as the key issue.
rationale.local_fix: The response proposes a local fix by changing the index expression to x[n] and adjusting the loop range to prevent out-of-bounds access.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests using std::array<int, 5> with bounds checking and adjusting the loop to depend on the container size, satisfying the global_fix criterion.
